roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOTION REMOVE SCRAM CONDITIONS FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE (TO SET) FILED

/TWS/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 10D/CTS:10/RESTR/PF390 18/MOP1/IID:1/LVAL/LCHEM/LSUSF:24/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/REMA/4019HALF/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:THIS IS A PLEA IN ABSENTIA/TEXT:DEFT ADV& PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:11-18-19/987,2/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/SA1:LANIYA B, AND LETREMONZIER C/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO UNDERGO SUBSTANCE ABUSE COUNSELING/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL, MARIJUANA, OR ANY ILLICIT SUBSTANCES/
/DAWT/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO REMOVE SCRAM DEVICE/MO GRTD/EMMOD:THE SCRAM DEVICE IS TO BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWF
/DAWT/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO REMOVE SCRAM DEVICE FROM THE DEFENDANT/CONT/DAWF/
/CAL:ACM PROGRESS REPORT/X:DEFENDANT RECEIVED A POSTIVE REPORT FROM ACM/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DAWF/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO REMOVE SCRAM DEVICE FROM THE DEFENDANT IS DENIED/
